task_completion.description: Open the VeraCrypt volume properties to identify the container path, encryption algorithm, and hash algorithm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt 'Volume Properties' dialog box is open for the volume mounted at '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot2', displaying details like Location, Encryption Algorithm, and Hash Algorithm.

task_completion.description: Access the mounted volume to count the number of files inside.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal is open showing the contents of the directory '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot2'.

task_completion.description: Create the forensic report JSON file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command is visible creating or editing a file explicitly named '/home/ga/Documents/forensic_report.json'.

task_completion.description: Populate the JSON report with the correct structure and extracted forensic data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows a JSON object containing the exact keys: 'container_path', 'encryption_algorithm', 'hash_algorithm', and 'file_count', with corresponding values filled in.
The VeraCrypt GUI shows that slot 2 is empty or no longer mounted, or a terminal command successfully dismounting the volume is visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with VeraCrypt to obtain the forensic details.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt GUI (specifically the properties window) must be visible in the screenshots to extract the algorithms and container path, rather than the agent hallucinating the JSON values.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not modify the contents of the mounted volume.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands (like touch, rm, mv) or file manager actions creating, deleting, or modifying files inside '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot2'.

integrity.description: Verify the report was saved to the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path '/home/ga/Documents/forensic_report.json' must be clearly visible in the editor's title bar, save dialog, or terminal command. It should not be saved elsewhere or only printed to standard output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required report path is explicitly verified as '/home/ga/Documents/forensic_report.json'. The VLM should ensure the JSON file is saved exactly at this location with the exact requested keys.
